intro: Build, care, and grow your ultimate zoo empire.
description:
Step into the role of a zoo owner and manager tasked with transforming a small, neglected park into a bustling wildlife attraction. Your goal is to create comfortable homes for animals, enjoyable experiences for visitors, and a successful, high-rated zoo. Every decision—from repairing enclosures to caring for exotic animals—shapes the future of your park.

Key Features:
• Build and Expand: Repair damaged enclosures, clean up debris, and restore old buildings. Expand your zoo by unlocking new areas and facilities through your office computer.
• Animal Management Purchase a variety of animals, from common species to rare, exotic creatures. Feed them, monitor their health, and maintain proper living conditions to keep them happy and stress-free.
• Visitor Experience: Improve comfort and enjoyment by building and upgrading cafes, restrooms, and decorative areas. The better the facilities, the longer guests will stay and the more they’ll spend.
• Maintenance and Staff: Keep your zoo running smoothly by repairing gates, water systems, and other equipment. Hire staff to assist with cleaning, repairs, and animal care.
• Progress and Reputation: Increase your zoo’s rating by balancing animal welfare, visitor satisfaction, and efficient management.

Transform a rundown zoo into a thriving wildlife sanctuary in Zoo Manager Simulator. Your creativity, strategy, and dedication will determine whether your park becomes a top-rated destination or remains just another forgotten zoo.
